title: Art, Architecture & Literature
topics: art styles · architecture · literary genres · describing and reviewing
description: Umění, architektura a literatura — slovní zásoba a jak hodnotit kulturní díla.

examples.en: The painting is both realistic and deeply symbolic.
examples.cz: Obraz je zároveň realistický a hluboce symbolický.

examples.en: The novel explores themes of identity and belonging.
examples.cz: Román zkoumá témata identity a sounáležitosti.

examples.en: The Gothic cathedral dominates the city skyline.
The plot twist in the final chapter was unexpected.
examples.cz: Nečekaný obrat děje v posledním chapter byl překvapivý.

examples.en: The haunting melody stayed with me long after the concert.
examples.cz: Pronásledující melodie mi zůstala v hlavě dlouho po koncertu.

quiz.sentence: Kafka's 'The Metamorphosis' is full of ___ — the insect represents alienation.
St. Vitus Cathedral in Prague is a fine example of ___ architecture.
The film was ___ — I kept thinking about it for days.
She wrote a short ___ about her childhood experiences.

tasks: 1. Write a 100-word review of a painting, book, or building you know well
2. Describe a piece of art or architecture from your city to a foreign visitor
3. Compare two literary works you've read: theme, style, characters
